content.query:
SELECT [ZipCode],
City,
County,
CBSA_Name,
MSA_Name,
DeliveryResidential,
DeliveryBusiness,
DeliveryTotal,
PopulationEstimate,
ClassificationCode,
AverageHouseValue,
IncomePerHousehold,
MedianAge,
Latitude,
Longitude,
[State]
 FROM [ODS].[MKTDATA_ZIP_CODES_DB_DELUXE_BUSINESS]
 where State = 'FL'
 and PrimaryRecord = 'P'
